name: TextArea
description: Genuinely functional multi-line text field: real controlled/uncontrolled value, live character counter computed from the actual value length (not a static '0/200'), and a native vertically-resizable textarea. Composes the existing Label and HintText components. 6 states: default/hover/focus/filled/disabled/error.
sourceNote: Reuses the existing Label (badge/sublabel/info-icon) and HintText (default/error/disabled) components directly rather than reimplementing them, following the pattern already established by ColorPicker/DatePicker's form-field composition. The character counter is real — computed from `value.length`/`maxLength` — instead of Figma's static '0/200' demo text, matching this project's precedent (Pagination, ProgressBar, PasswordStrength) of favoring functional behavior. Figma's 'Filled' state is visually identical to 'Default' in the source trace (same border/shadow, just with text present) so no separate CSS was needed. The counter's 'Resize' icon is decorative — the textarea has real `resize: vertical` for native dragging — substituted with RemixIcon's `expand-diagonal-2-line` in place of Figma's raster asset.
